status.description: PENDING, APPROVED, REJECTED, EXECUTED, EXPIRED, FAILED

is_batch_process.description: true if step runs in batches

min_wait_minutes.description: e.g. cooling time before next step

predecessor_step_ids.description: JSON array of step_ids; empty = infer from StepSequence

downtimeMinutes.description: Gap 7 - downtime during slot for OEE

type.description: shelf, rack, cold, hazardous, floor, dock

quantity_per_unit.description: required; qty per 1 unit of parent

product_id.description: sub-product, required if material_id not set

quantity_per_unit.description: required; qty per 1 unit of parent

job_ids.description: explicit job IDs; if empty and Scope set, use scope

scope.description: "all_unscheduled" = all jobs with status planned/scheduled and no active slots

formula_id.description: Optional; generated with F- prefix when omitted.

machine_id.description: Optional; generated with M- prefix when omitted.

material_id.description: Optional; generated with MAT- prefix when omitted.

process_id.description: Optional; generated with PRC- prefix when omitted.

product_id.description: Optional; generated with P- prefix when omitted.

downtime_minutes.description: Gap 7 - downtime during slot for OEE

option_type.description: OptionType: omit or "replenish" (default) = material expected arrival; "schedule_production" = planned subproduct stock (product_id in material_id).

dry_run.description: if true: preview only, no cancel/delete/persist; returns proposals without side effects

actual_start.description: Production / execution (Gap 2 - Start, Pause, Resume, Complete)

job_ids.description: optional when scope=applied; if empty, check all jobs with active slots

proposals.description: or pass inline (e.g. data.proposals from batch-proposals)
